_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: PTM-MS following treatment of NF1 mutant NF9511b pNF cells with 1 μM pan KRAS inhibitor (BI-2865) identified 49 significantly downregulated phosphopeptides and 144 significantly upregulated phosphopeptides
details: Successfully identified 49 significantly downregulated phosphopeptides and 144 significantly upregulated phosphopeptides following KRAS inhibitor treatment
